story: Mike and Mia prepare Glen's rooftop spectacle: Ronald McDonald 'suicide' and twelve miniatures dropping in sync. Mike secures a nearby roof; Mia runs logistics.  Later, Mia decides on a special‑effects swap: at the crucial moment a lifelike model, rigged with paint, will fall while Glen stays on the ledge; only she and Glen are briefed. Night comes. Cameras stream; a crowd gathers. On screens, Mike sees Glen at the edge. They tilt into darkness. Lights up: the figures plunge toward a red‑and‑white target. Impact—red splashes across the pavement. In the gallery, all twelve miniatures drop in sync, paint blooming. Mike is shaken.
implausible_knowledge: Later, Mia decides on a special‑effects swap: at the crucial moment a lifelike model, rigged with paint, will fall while Glen stays on the ledge; only she and Glen are briefed.
question: Right after the impact, with red splashing and the crowd reacting but before any explanation, what is Mike most likely to do?
answer_with_knowledge: Stay put and keep monitoring the bids and stream.
answer_without_knowledge: Call 911 to report an apparent fatal fall.
